title: Pan-Seared Fish with Croatian-Style Bisque
description: A flavorful dish featuring pan-seared fish served with a rich and creamy bisque made with Croatian influences.

ingredients.name: Croatian-Style Bisque (see below)
ingredients.notes: Note: Bisque ingredients not included in this list.

instructions: Season the fish with salt and pepper.
Heat the butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and onion to the skillet and sauté until softened.
Add the fish to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Remove the fish from the skillet and serve with Croatian-Style Bisque.
